scope: framework-level agent evaluation, recovery, quality-ref projection, and improvement control plane

independent_ai_review_assessment_surface.fixture_or_generated_receipts: review_pending and never counted as AI review approval
independent_ai_review_assessment_surface.attempt_separation: the execution attempt and reviewer/auditor attempt must be separate refs and the review context must not inherit executor context
independent_ai_review_assessment_surface.authority_boundary: scorecard.passed and fixture/domain suite pass are structural or domain scorecard signals only; they cannot authorize automatic mechanism promotion without a real independent AI review assessment and promotion safety assessment

promotion_safety_assessment_surface.regression_guard_only: no current real failure delta is present; suite and scorecard pass only guard regressions and never authorize automatic mechanism promotion
promotion_ready_requires: real independent_ai_review_receipt_ref matching approved independent AI review assessment
separate execution_attempt_ref and review_attempt_ref for the AI reviewer/auditor attempt
promotion_safety_assessment_surface.advisory_only_policy: advisory-only signals can support regression visibility and operator triage but never set automatic_mechanism_promotion_ready=true
promotion_safety_assessment_surface.high_risk_policy: high_risk changes require owner_or_human_gate_refs and never set automatic_mechanism_promotion_ready=true
promotion_safety_assessment_surface.authority_boundary: promotion safety only gates OPL mechanism auto-promotion. It does not authorize domain ready, quality verdicts, artifact mutation, memory body writes, owner receipts, or production ready claims.

longline_surface.authority_boundary: refs-only projection; OPL cannot authorize domain truth, quality verdicts, artifact mutation, memory body writes, or owner receipts

external_suite_runner_surface.input: OPL-compatible Agent Lab suite JSON generated by a domain agent or OPL-compatible meta-agent repo
external_suite_runner_surface.compatibility_boundary: The producing domain agent declares OPL Agent Lab compatibility; OPL Agent Lab validates refs-only suite shape and never becomes the domain design center.
external_suite_runner_surface.authority_boundary: runs the same refs-only Agent Lab validation as built-in suites; cannot write domain truth, memory body, artifacts, owner receipts, or default agent config

production_evidence_gate_surface.compatibility_boundary: Domain agents provide agent_production_evidence_suite input and production_evidence_gate refs after declaring OPL Agent Lab compatibility.
production_evidence_gate_surface.authority_boundary: OPL Agent Lab may recognize domain agent production evidence gate refs and emit gate-result refs for the declaring domain agent or opl-meta-agent handoff. It cannot write domain truth, quality verdicts, artifact bodies, memory bodies, owner receipts, or owner receipt bodies.

mechanism_evolution_input_surface.authority_boundary: OPL Agent Lab may consume suite-projected runtime event ledger refs, provider/executor switch hygiene refs, claim assurance refs, helper skill drift guard refs, assurance contract refs, adversarial review gate refs, experiment queue recovery refs, and publication aftercare refs as mechanism evolution inputs. These are refs-only signals and cannot carry body, domain truth, artifact body, memory body, owner receipt body, quality verdict, publication verdict, writeback accept/reject authority, shared submission action authority, helper execution authority, or publication submission authority.

workbench_surface.authority_boundary: App/workbench can consume refs-only read model; OPL still cannot authorize domain truth, quality verdicts, artifact mutation, memory body writes, owner receipts, model training, or default agent promotion

developer_mode_repair_route_surface.authority_boundary: Developer Mode patrol and repair routes are refs-only projections for issue/blocker triage, branch/worktree routing, PR refs, acceptance evidence refs, and follow-up queue item refs; they do not write domain truth, artifacts, memory bodies, quality verdicts, owner receipts, or managed runtime state.

mechanism_promotion_policy.risk_tiers: low_risk auto-promotes to stable; medium_risk auto-promotes to canary; high_risk routes to owner or human gate

mechanism_surface.authority_boundary: mechanism is a first-class risk-tiered object; low and medium risk mechanism changes can auto-promote through canary only after real failure/evidence delta, real independent AI review, promotion receipt, rollback target, no-forbidden-write proof, and medium-risk canary refs are present; high risk changes route to owner or human gate and cannot write domain truth, memory body, artifacts, model weights, owner receipts, credential policy, network policy, or write policy

integration_contract_surface.cli: opl agent-lab complete | opl agent-lab workbench | opl agent-lab mechanism
integration_contract_surface.authority_boundary: integration contracts are refs-only gates for cross skill, stage, helper, mechanism-promotion, and owner-route integration; they fail closed through typed blocker, owner route, retry/dead-letter, or rollback refs and cannot write domain truth, memory body, artifacts, quality verdicts, owner receipts, or managed runtime state

review_trace_ledger_surface.cli: opl agent-lab complete | opl agent-lab workbench | opl agent-lab mechanism | opl agent-lab evolve --suite <suite.json>
review_trace_ledger_surface.authority_boundary: review trace ledger records request, response, evidence, reviewed diff, contract, test result, reviewer agent, and no-shared-context refs for replay and rollback; it cannot approve domain truth, write memory bodies, mutate artifacts, or write owner receipts

log_driven_candidate_surface.cli: opl agent-lab complete | opl agent-lab workbench | opl agent-lab mechanism | opl agent-lab optimize/evolve --suite <suite.json>
log_driven_candidate_surface.risk_policy: log-mined candidates enter the same low/medium/high risk promotion policy as other mechanism candidates; log signals alone never authorize high-risk surface mutation
log_driven_candidate_surface.authority_boundary: log-driven meta optimize emits mechanism candidate refs from real usage logs, failure modes, user interrupts, convergence iterations, tool failures, and blockers; it cannot write domain truth, artifacts, memory bodies, quality verdicts, owner receipts, credential policy, network policy, write policy, or model weights

aris_maturity_controls_surface.cli: opl agent-lab complete | opl agent-lab workbench | opl agent-lab mechanism | opl agent-lab evolve --suite <suite.json>
aris_maturity_controls_surface.authority_boundary: ARIS v0.4.11 maturity controls are absorbed as refs-only control-plane patterns: effort/assurance axes, helper inventory and drift reports, permission/current-date fail-closed invariants, and MCP/stream reliability policy. They cannot introduce an ARIS runtime dependency, execute helpers, read MCP or stream payload bodies, write domain truth, memory body, artifacts, owner receipts, quality verdicts, or managed runtime state.

export_surface.authority_boundary: connector envelopes only carry refs and connector-shaped metadata; connectors cannot read domain bodies or upload from OPL core

optimize_surface.input: OPL-compatible Agent Lab suite JSON generated by a domain agent or OPL-compatible meta-agent repo
optimize_surface.risk_policy: low and medium risk mechanism candidates can auto-promote only with real failure/evidence delta, real independent AI review assessment, promotion receipt, rollback target, no-forbidden-write proof, and medium-risk canary refs; fixture scorecards, generated receipts, no-current-failure, and structural suite pass stay regression_guard_only, review_pending, or blocked_from_auto_promotion; high risk candidates route to owner or human gate
optimize_surface.authority_boundary: optimization emits risk-tiered mechanism candidate refs, canary promotion receipt refs, rollback target refs, no-forbidden-write proof refs, and RL transition refs only; it cannot train or deploy weights, write domain truth, write memory bodies, mutate artifacts, write owner receipts, accept or reject memory writeback, override domain owner verdicts, or mutate credential, network, or write policy

evolution_surface.input: OPL-compatible Agent Lab suite JSON generated by a domain agent or OPL-compatible meta-agent repo
evolution_surface.risk_policy: low and medium risk mechanism changes can auto-promote through canary only with real failure/evidence delta, real independent AI review assessment, promotion receipt, rollback target, no-forbidden-write proof, and medium-risk canary refs; fixture scorecards, generated receipts, no-current-failure, and structural suite pass stay regression_guard_only, review_pending, or blocked_from_auto_promotion; high risk changes route to owner or human gate
evolution_surface.authority_boundary: evolution emits mechanism candidate refs, evidence-delta refs, independent AI review receipt refs, canary promotion receipt refs, rollback target refs, and no-forbidden-write proof refs; it cannot write domain truth, memory body, artifacts, owner receipts, model weights, credential policy, network policy, write policy, or domain owner receipts

agent_lab_proves: OPL can normalize domain-declared evaluation task manifests
OPL can carry agent trajectory refs without reading private domain truth bodies
OPL can project recovery probes for resume, retry, dead-letter repair, human gate resume, and artifact restore
OPL can aggregate domain-owned quality scorecard refs without authorizing quality verdicts
OPL can turn run evidence into improvement candidates and promotion gates
OPL can centralize cross-domain longline soak orchestration and recovery projections while leaving domain scorer and owner authority in domain repos
OPL can expose a complete eval adapter, observability export, and optimizer-loop control plane without requiring external services in core
OPL can expose an App/workbench-ready read model with eval adapter, observability export, optimizer candidate, promotion gate, and online learning refs
OPL can expose Developer Mode patrol repair routes as refs-only issue, blocker, owner route, candidate fix, worktree, branch, PR, acceptance evidence, and follow-up queue item projections
OPL can expose integration contracts with activation predicate, canonical entry, artifact verifier, failure policy, typed blocker, owner route, retry/dead-letter, and rollback refs
OPL can record independent AI reviewer, web research, and mechanism patch trace refs with request, response, evidence, diff, contract, test result, reviewer agent, and no-shared-context refs
OPL can mine usage logs, failure modes, user interrupts, convergence iterations, tool failures, and blockers into refs-only prompt, skill, rubric, and workflow-default mechanism candidate refs
OPL can project ARIS v0.4.11 effort/assurance axes, helper inventory drift reports, permission/current-date fail-closed invariants, and MCP/stream reliability policies as refs-only maturity controls
OPL can emit refs-only export envelopes for optional Inspect AI, OpenInference, Langfuse, Phoenix, and JSON consumers without uploading data
OPL can run an external suite into gated optimizer candidate refs and RL transition refs without training weights or promoting a default agent

OPL can auto-promote low and medium risk mechanism changes through canary when real failure/evidence delta, independent AI review, promotion receipt, rollback target, no-forbidden-write proof, and medium-risk canary refs are present
OPL can route high risk mechanism changes to owner or human gate instead of applying them automatically
OPL can treat mechanism as a first-class refs-only object with editable surface refs, meta edit receipt refs, evolution segment refs, evidence delta refs, and next mechanism candidate refs
OPL can fail closed on memory body payloads and forbidden authority claims
agent_lab_does_not_prove: domain research memory graph body ownership
developer-mode repair merged, accepted, or applied by OPL
managed runtime mutation through Developer Mode patrol projection
high risk mechanism candidate promotion without owner or human gate
automatic model training or weight deployment
forbidden_authority: high risk mechanism candidate promotion without owner or human gate

external_framework_policy.rl_training_boundary: downstream consumer only after stable trajectory and reward surfaces
